sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93563" key="seiri=a/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σειρῖάζω</orth>, <sense id="n93563.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sparkle, twinkle</tr_>, given as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Σειρῆνες</foreign> used as name of the planets, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. Theo Sm.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.146H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
